item.title: UK's Reeves promises stability against backdrop of Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
LONDON, March 3 - British finance minister Rachel Reeves said she would provide stability for the economy in a budget update speech on Tuesday that contained no big policy surprises and was overshadowed by alarm among investors over the conflict in the Middle East.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Tunisia jails tycoon Mabrouk and ex-PM Chahed on corruption charges
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
TUNIS, March 3 - A Tunisian court on Tuesday sentenced the country's richest businessman, Marouan Mabrouk, son-in-law of former president Zine El Abidine Ben Ali, to 20 years in prison, and former prime minister Youssef Chahed to six years, in corruption cases, lawyers said.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Lebanon sucked deeper into war as Hezbollah, Israel trade blows
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT/JERUSALEM, March 3 - Lebanon was pulled deeper into the war in the Middle East on Tuesday as the Iran-backed Lebanese group Hezbollah launched missiles at Israel for a second consecutive day and Israel sent troops into the south and carried out waves of air strikes.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Qatar says Iran didn’t warn of missile attacks, no comms with Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Qatar's Ministry of Foreign Affairs says there is currently no communication between Doha and Tehran.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Russia says war could backfire by spurring Iran and Arab nations to seek nuclear weapons
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MOSCOW, March 3 - Russia warned on Tuesday that the war launched by the U.S. and Israel against Iran could result in the very outcome they were seeking to prevent, by spurring both Iran and its Arab neighbours to seek to acquire nuclear weapons.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Maritime insurers cancel war risk cover in Gulf: Will it spike energy cost?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Insurers announced they were cancelling war risk coverage after the IRGC said the Strait of Hormuz was 'closed'.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Turkey eyes lifting U.S. CAATSA sanctions before U.S. midterms
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ANKARA, March 3 - Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said work was underway with the United States to lift sanctions imposed on Ankara before the U.S. midterm elections in November, but added Israel was opposed to the potential move.
Matched: sanctions(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Greek shipping minister warns of alarming situation in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ATHENS, March 3 - Greece's shipping minister on Tuesday called for the protection of global shipping and seafarers, amid an \"alarming\" situation that has left dozens of ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz and the wider area due to the widening Iran conflict.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘Russian oil will be sought’: What are Moscow’s gains from the war in Iran?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Russia, one of Iran's few allies, could profit from the war as it navigates diplomatic relations with Iran and Israel.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel uses cargo ships to repatriate doctors stranded abroad by war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
JERUSALEM, March 3 - Israeli authorities are using container ships to bring back dozens of essential medical staff stuck abroad after the air war with Iran broke out on Saturday, disrupting travel, according to Israel's cargo firm ZIM Shipping.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Al Jazeera investigation: Iran girls’ school targeting likely ‘deliberate’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Al Jazeera investigation raises questions over deadliest single attack of war that killed 165 schoolgirls and staff.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Analysis – Trump’s foreign policy message in a nutshell: ‘We can reach you’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Trump makes adversaries and reluctant partners central to his politics, pairing direct threats with transactional deals.
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump says US war supplies mean it can fight 'forever'
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - Donald Trump said the U.S. military has enough stockpiled weapons to fight wars \"forever\", as the Republican president and his administration continued their push to justify a broad, open-ended war on Iran with shifting aims and timeline.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UK yet to decide on sending warship to defend Cyprus base
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
LONDON, March 3 - Britain has yet to decide whether it will send a warship to defend its Royal Air Force Akrotiri base in Cyprus, a source close to the matter said on Tuesday after the Times newspaper reported ministers had discussed such a deployment.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UN chief warns of Israeli-made humanitarian crisis in Gaza amid war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Crossings have been shut since Saturday as the displaced population of Gaza remains dependent on humanitarian aid.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Turkey says it's engaging with all sides to end Iran war, resume diplomacy
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ANKARA, March 3 - Turkey is engaging with all parties to find a way to end the war in Iran and return to negotiations, Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said, adding that Ankara was also in talks with Oman on the matter as the Gulf nation works for the same goal.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran expands Gulf assault as Trump warns of protracted war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Israel seizes ground in southern Lebanon as it now fights on two fronts.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran mourns 165 girls, staff killed in school strike during US-Israel war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Attack in southern Iran that hit civilians was the deadliest of the US-Israeli war against Tehran so far.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Europe faces difficult choices in US and Israel’s war with Iran
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The war exposes Europe’s difficult choices and disunity.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US imposes sanctions on Rwanda military over east Congo fighting
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 2 - The U.S. on Monday imposed sanctions on the Rwanda Defence Force and top military officials over their role in ongoing fighting in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo and called for their immediate withdrawal from the mineral-rich region.
Matched: sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘Trump didn’t follow legal proceedings to launch this war’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
'Trump left all options open for when he would be bored with this to decide it's done and find a way to declare victory'
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Singaporeans in Middle East asked to indicate interest in 'assisted departure' amid airport closures
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The Ministry of Foreign Affairs said it is conducting a survey to gauge interest and stressed that no evacuation has been announced.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: European capitals push back as Ukraine seeks fast-track EU membership
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BRUSSELS, March 3 - Ukraine’s push for a fast track into the European Union as part of any peace deal has hit stiff resistance from EU governments, who do not want to open the Pandora’s box of problems that they fear a quick accession would unleash.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US homeland chief Noem to face scrutiny on immigration crackdown at Senate hearing
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - U.S. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem is expected to face tough questions over President Donald Trump's immigration crackdown during a Senate hearing on Tuesday, with funding for her department still stalled due to Democratic objections to its aggressive tactics.
Matched: ai(+3), funding(+2)
